chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1811 of 2025 CP D 1812 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.9029/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 15-05-2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Siddiqui, advocate holds brief for Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent department. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Naveed Elahi, Collector of Customs Appraisement, West, Karachi. Mr. Jahanzeb Abbasi, Addl. Collector Customs, West, Karachi. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector of Customs Pursuant to the last order, Mr. Naveed Elahi, Collector of Customs Appraisement, West, Karachi is present. He states that written assessment orders shall be provided to the petitioners in respect of the GDs subject matter herein. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioners states that the petitions have served their purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of the learned Collector is appreciated. Office to place a copy hereof in the connected petition. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
